text.title: Seven Performance Domains (PMBOK 8) Examples
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how the seven-performance-domains methodology converts inputs into a valid `spec` artefact. Trace mirrors the decision-tree example in `06-decision-tree.xml`.

example.setting: A representative case satisfying all `Applies If` preconditions.
example.trace: pmbok_governance=true → owner_count=7 → value_metric_present=true → baseline check passes → status reporting begins.
